name: openhands-tab
description: A VS Code extension to interact with OpenHands agents in a dedicated sidebar chat view

commands.title: OpenHands: Set LiteLLM Proxy API Key
OpenHands: Set Runtime Session API Key
OpenHands: Login to Remote Server (Device Flow)
OpenHands: Set HAL TTS API Key

openhands.llm.profileId.markdownDescription:
LLM profile identifier (filename stem). OpenHands loads provider/model/baseUrl/tuning from `~/.openhands/llm-profiles/<profileId>.json`.

To manage profiles and API keys, use the **LLM Profiles** view inside the OpenHands sidebar.

openhands.oracle.profileId.markdownDescription:
LLM profile identifier (filename stem) used by the `ask_oracle` tool.

When unset, `ask_oracle` returns an instructive error and suggests configuring this setting.

openhands.agent.summarizeToolCalls.markdownDescription: Generate short `gemini-flash` summaries for tool calls (requires a Gemini API key).

openhands.devBridge.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable webview→extension debug logging bridge (Output channel + file in extension log path).

openhands.logging.verbosity.markdownDescription:
Controls OpenHands Output channel verbosity.

- `minimal` (default): suppress routine informational lines in Production.
- `verbose`: print more logs and auto-show the Output channel.

Note: enabling `openhands.agent.debug` or `openhands.devBridge.enabled` also turns on verbose-style logging.

openhands.confirmation.policy.markdownDescription: Action confirmation policy: never ask, always ask, or ask for risky actions.

openhands.confirmation.risky.threshold.markdownDescription: Risk threshold for ConfirmRisky policy. Actions at or above this require confirmation.

openhands.confirmation.risky.confirmUnkn.markdownDescription: Whether actions with UNKNOWN risk require confirmation in risky mode.

openhands.hal.enabled.markdownDescription: Enable the HAL high-risk confirmation flow.

openhands.hal.mode.markdownDescription: HAL mode when enabled: `bundled` (E2E/CI), `tts_only` (TTS + buttons), `voice_confirm` (TTS + mic + Gemini).

openhands.hal.userName.markdownDescription: User name used only in templated HAL script lines.

openhands.hal.ttsApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your HAL TTS API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure HAL TTS API Key](command:openhands.setHalTtsApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Used for HAL voice synthesis (backend currently ElevenLabs).)_

openhands.hal.voiceAId.markdownDescription: TTS voice ID for HAL (voice A). (For the ElevenLabs backend, this is an ElevenLabs voice ID.)

openhands.hal.voiceUserId.markdownDescription: TTS voice ID for the user (voice B, used in `tts_only` mode). (For the ElevenLabs backend, this is an ElevenLabs voice ID.)

openhands.hal.cache.markdownDescription: Enable caching for generated HAL TTS audio.

openhands.hal.llmProfileId.markdownDescription: LLM profile id used for `voice_confirm` classification (expected Gemini provider).

openhands.serverUrl.markdownDescription: OpenHands agent-server base URL. Leave blank to run in local mode.

openhands.servers.markdownDescription: List of saved OpenHands server URLs with optional labels.

openhands.conversation.maxIterations.markdownDescription: Default max iterations for new conversations (server default is 500).

openhands.conversation.storeRoot.markdownDescription: Optional directory for local-mode conversation history/events. Leave empty to use `~/.openhands/conversations-vscode/`.

openhands.terminal.renderProgress.markdownDescription: Coalesce carriage-return (\r) progress updates in the OpenHands terminal log (keeps only the last update per line).

openhands.secrets.cloudApiKey.markdownDescription:
**OpenHands Cloud API Key**

[🔑 Configure Cloud API Key](command:openhands.setCloudApiKey)

_(Stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json.)_

Notes:
- This is your **Cloud API Key / SaaS user token** (Device Flow `access_token`).
- Used to authenticate to the **SaaS/app-server** as `Authorization: Bearer ...`.

openhands.secrets.runtimeSessionApiKey.markdownDescription:
**Runtime session API key (nested agent-server)**

[🔑 Configure Runtime Session API Key](command:openhands.setRuntimeSessionApiKey)

_(Stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json.)_

Notes:
- This is the runtime/sandbox `session_api_key`.
- Used to authenticate to the **nested agent-server** as `X-Session-API-Key: ...` (and currently as WS `?session_api_key=...`).

openhands.secrets.githubToken.markdownDescription:
**To set your GitHub token securely:**

[🔑 Configure GitHub Token](command:openhands.setGithubToken)

_(Tokens are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.openaiApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your OpenAI API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure OpenAI API Key](command:openhands.setOpenAiApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Stored as `OPENAI_API_KEY`.)_

openhands.secrets.anthropicApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your Anthropic API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure Anthropic API Key](command:openhands.setAnthropicApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Stored as `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.)_

openhands.secrets.openrouterApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your OpenRouter API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure OpenRouter API Key](command:openhands.setOpenRouterApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Stored as `OPENROUTER_API_KEY`.)_

openhands.secrets.litellmApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your LiteLLM Proxy API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure LiteLLM Proxy API Key](command:openhands.setLiteLlmApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Stored as `LITELLM_API_KEY`.)_

openhands.secrets.geminiLlmApiKey.markdownDescription:
**To set your Gemini API key securely:**

[🔑 Configure Gemini API Key](command:openhands.setGeminiLlmApiKey)

_(Keys are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json. Stored as `GEMINI_API_KEY`.)_

openhands.secrets.customSecret1.markdownDescription:
**To set your custom secret 1 securely:**

[🔑 Configure Custom Secret 1](command:openhands.setCustomSecret1)

_(Secrets are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.customSecret2.markdownDescription:
**To set your custom secret 2 securely:**

[🔑 Configure Custom Secret 2](command:openhands.setCustomSecret2)

_(Secrets are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

openhands.secrets.customSecret3.markdownDescription:
**To set your custom secret 3 securely:**

[🔑 Configure Custom Secret 3](command:openhands.setCustomSecret3)

_(Secrets are stored in secure system keychain, not in settings.json)_

scripts.build: npm run build -w @smolpaws/agent-sdk && npm run compile
scripts.compile: node esbuild.extension.mjs && npm run build:tailwind && npm run build:webview
scripts.e2e: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('tests/e2e/out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run compile && tsc -p tests/e2e/tsconfig.suite.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json && mocha tests/e2e/out/**/*.test.js
scripts.e2e:agent-server: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('tests/e2e/out', { recursive: true, force: true })" && npm run compile && tsc -p tests/e2e/tsconfig.suite.json && tsc -p tsconfig.e2e.json && mocha "tests/e2e/out/agentServerRemote*.test.js"
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @smolpaws/agent-sdk && eslint src tests && npm run lint:cycles && npm run lint:duplication
